name: Unit appliances
examples: Per-unit refrigerators, ranges, dishwashers, microwaves, washers/dryers.

name: Carpet and vinyl flooring
examples: Carpet and resilient flooring throughout units and common areas.

name: Common-area furnishings
examples: Clubhouse furniture, gym equipment, removable decor.

name: Site work and paving
examples: Parking lot, sidewalks, curbs, site concrete.

name: Exterior site amenities
examples: Pool, dog park, playground, tennis/pickleball courts, site lighting.

name: Building structure
examples: Foundation, structural framing, roof, exterior envelope.

name: Core building systems
examples: Central HVAC or per-unit, domestic water, sanitary, fire, electrical.

name: Interior finishes (fixed)
examples: Hardwood, tile, cabinetry, built-in millwork, attached countertops.
